name: ase-skills
description: Depth pack for the IEEE/ACM Automated Software Engineering conference: automated-SE venue routing, the Accept/Revision/Reject research-track model with early rejection and a criteria-bound revision round, double-anonymous HotCRP submission on the ACM acmart template, ACM artifact badging, dual IEEE-Xplore/ACM-DL proceedings, and the NIER, Tools-and-Datasets, and Journal-First tracks.

plugins.name: ase-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ASE-specific skills for the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering and its automated-SE research track, grounded in the ASE 2025/2026 researchr calls, the ase26.hotcrp.com submission site, IEEE Xplore, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
